strengths: Built production ETL and BI pipelines
Clear stakeholder communication and data storytelling
weaknesses: Limited direct IVR/voice AI or telephony experience
No explicit healthcare or revenue-cycle experience
QA/workflow escalation systems not clearly documented
NYC in-person availability not explicitly stated
improvement_bullets: Developed robust QA workflows and automated data validation scripts using Python and Great Expectations to ensure 99% pipeline reliability.
Led root-cause analysis investigations into operational data discrepancies, identifying bottlenecks in CRM integrations and reducing manual ticket resolution time by 30%.
Partnered with cross-functional leadership on proactive stakeholder communication, translating complex technical findings into actionable operational strategy.
Optimized data accessibility by building interactive Excel pivot tables and dashboards, enabling non-technical stakeholders to perform self-service data analysis.
Designed and monitored system health metrics to support real-time operational monitoring, ensuring consistent performance across all business data pipelines.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Business Operations Analyst opportunity with Standard Practice AI. I am interested in this opportunity because of your innovative approach to automating critical healthcare infrastructure; the prospect of applying technical rigor to improve the efficiency of payer and provider workflows truly resonates with my background in data-driven operations. What interests me about working for Standard Practice AI is its mission to solve the 'offline data' problem through cutting-edge voice AI, which strikes me as a high-impact way to improve the healthcare revenue cycle. I believe my expertise in building scalable data pipelines and my ability to derive actionable operational insights would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my time at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I approached problems by building structured automation to eliminate operational friction. In fact, I developed Python-based ETL pipelines to ingest complex POS and CRM data, which allowed me to replace manual reporting workflows. This resulted in saving 8 hours per week in manual labor and provided the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend, proving my ability to turn raw data into bottom-line growth. Ultimately, I know that the Business Operations Analyst role at Standard Practice AI would allow me to bring my technical skills in Python and SQL to improve platform performance and reliability. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst and Operations Lead enabled me to develop my root-cause analysis and stakeholder communication skills. I consistently conducted deep-dive analyses to resolve data quality issues, ensuring that cross-functional teams were aligned on a 'single source of truth' for KPIs. This resulted in a 40% improvement in work efficiency and significantly reduced reporting discrepancies across the organization. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data monitoring to assist in building the next generation of voice AI operational systems at Standard Practice AI. I know that my analytical mindset and technical versatility align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my experience in New York-based operations can contribute to your team. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
